sections.heading: 1. Purpose
sections.body: These Terms of Use govern the use of the Trama service (hereinafter, "the Service") made available to users. Accessing the Service implies full and unconditional acceptance of these terms.

sections.heading: 2. Acceptance of terms
sections.body: By registering and using the Service you accept these terms. If you do not agree with any of them, you must refrain from using the Service.

sections.heading: 3. Registration and account
sections.body: To access certain features, you must create an account by providing accurate information. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activity carried out under your account.

sections.heading: 4. Use of the service
sections.body: You agree to use the Service in accordance with the law, morality and public order. Use of the Service for unlawful purposes or in a way that could harm third parties is prohibited.

sections.heading: 5. Intellectual property
sections.body: All contents of the Service, including text, images and code, are the property of Trama or of third-party licensors. Their reproduction, distribution or transformation without authorization is prohibited.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of liability
sections.body: Trama is not liable for direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the Service, including data loss, interruptions or unauthorized access, except in cases provided for by law.

sections.heading: 7. Modifications
sections.body: Trama reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will take effect upon publication. Continued use of the Service implies acceptance of the modified terms.

sections.heading: 8. Applicable law
sections.body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts.

sections.heading: 1. Data controller
sections.body: The controller of your personal data is Trama. You may contact us through the channels available in the Service.

sections.heading: 2. Data collected
sections.body: We collect the data you provide at registration (name, email, date of birth), as well as data generated through your use of the Service (preferences, books added, activity).

sections.heading: 3. Purpose of processing
sections.body: We use your data to provide the Service, manage your account, improve the experience and comply with our legal obligations.

sections.heading: 4. Legal basis
sections.body: Processing is based on the execution of the contract arising from acceptance of the terms, on your consent and, where applicable, on compliance with legal obligations.

sections.heading: 5. Retention
sections.body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active and for the periods legally required after its termination.

sections.heading: 6. User rights
sections.body: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability by writing to our contact channels.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
sections.body: For any privacy-related inquiry you may contact us through the means provided in the Service.
